flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Simmons University fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (84.0% → 75.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Simmons University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (71.2% vs 77.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Simmons University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
